---
title: "Multipoverty"
author: "Gruppo F"
format: html
---

CONFRONTO SUB-SAHARAN AFRICA CON IL MONDO

```{r}
install.packages("jsonlite")
library(jsonlite)
hdi.ssa <- fromJSON("hdr-data.json")
hdi.ssa <- hdi.ssa[, c(2,8,11)]
names(hdi.ssa)[names(hdi.ssa) == "value"] <- "HDI"
hdi.ssa$year <- as.numeric(hdi.ssa$year)
hdi.ssa$HDI <- as.numeric(hdi.ssa$HDI)

hdi.w <- fromJSON("hdi.world.json")
hdi.w <- hdi.w[, c(2,8,11)]
names(hdi.w)[names(hdi.w) == "value"] <- "HDI"
hdi.w$year <- as.numeric(hdi.w$year)
hdi.w$HDI <- as.numeric(hdi.w$HDI)



hdi <- rbind(hdi.ssa, hdi.w)
ggplot(hdi, aes(x = year, y = HDI, color = country)) +
  geom_line(size = 1.2) +
  labs(
    title = "HDI Sub-Saharan Africa vs World",
    x = "Anno",
    y = "HDI",
    color = "Legenda"
  ) +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = seq(1990, 2023, by = 5)) +
  scale_y_continuous(breaks = seq(0.4, 0.8, by = 0.05)) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1))



```

# CONFRONTO TRA SUDAFRICA, NIGERIA E SENEGAL 

## GDP PER CAPITA

```{r}
library(tidyr)
library(dplyr)
gdp <- read.csv("gdp.csv")
gdp <- gdp[c(1:4),c(-1,-2,-4)]

gdp[ , -1] <- lapply(gdp[ , -1], function(x) as.numeric(as.character(x)))
gdp_long <- gdp %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = -Country.Name,
    names_to = "year",
    values_to = "gdp"
  )
gdp_long$year <- as.integer(sub("X(\\d{4}).*", "\\1", gdp_long$year))

ggplot(gdp_long, aes(x = year, y = gdp, color = Country.Name)) +
  geom_line(size = 1.2) +
  labs(
    title = "GDP per capita (current US$)",
    x = "Anno",
    y = "GDP per capita (current US$)",
    color = "Paese"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()
```

## ciaooooo
#cai






























```{r}
library(jsonlite)

# Carica i dati dal CSV
df <- read.csv("https://ourworldindata.org/grapher/multidimensional-poverty-index-mpi-hot.csv?v=1&csvType=full&useColumnShortNames=true")

# Carica i metadati dal JSON
metadata <- fromJSON("https://ourworldindata.org/grapher/multidimensional-poverty-index-mpi-hot.metadata.json?v=1&csvType=full&useColumnShortNames=true")

dfGH <- df[c(76,77,78,79,80),]
dfNGA <- df[c(165,166,167,168),]
dfSEN <- df[c(193,194,195,196),]

#GHANA
dfGH <- dfGH[order(dfGH$year), ]
anni_completi_GH <- seq(min(dfGH$year), max(dfGH$year), by = 1)
val_interp_GH <- approx(
  x = dfGH$year,
  y = dfGH$mpi,
  xout = anni_completi_GH
)
df_interp_GH <- data.frame(
  year = val_interp_GH$x,
  mpi = val_interp_GH$y
)

#NIGERIA
dfNGA <- dfNGA[order(dfNGA$year), ]
anni_completi_NGA <- seq(min(dfNGA$year), max(dfNGA$year), by = 1)
val_interp_NGA <- approx(
  x = dfNGA$year,
  y = dfNGA$mpi,
  xout = anni_completi_NGA
)
df_interp_NGA <- data.frame(
  year = val_interp_NGA$x,
  mpi = val_interp_NGA$y
)

#SENEGAL
dfSEN <- dfSEN[order(dfSEN$year), ]
anni_completi_SEN <- seq(min(dfSEN$year), max(dfSEN$year), by = 1)
val_interp_SEN <- approx(
  x = dfSEN$year,
  y = dfSEN$mpi,
  xout = anni_completi_SEN
)
df_interp_SEN <- data.frame(
  year = val_interp_SEN$x,
  mpi = val_interp_SEN$y
)
```


#Da capire se va inserite delle tabelle prima dei grafici, oppure se è meglio inserire solo i grafici con i dati interpolati.


#MPI interpolato annualmente per Ghana, Nigeria e Senegal (2013-2021)

```{r}
#Grafico 3 paesi a confronto (anche anni diversi)
df_interp_GH$country <- "Ghana"
df_interp_NGA$country <- "Nigeria"
df_interp_SEN$country <- "Senegal"
df_final <- rbind(df_interp_GH, df_interp_NGA, df_interp_SEN)
library(ggplot2)

ggplot(df_final, aes(x = year, y = mpi, color = country)) +
  geom_line(size = 1.2) +
  labs(
    title = "Confronto MPI (interpolato annualmente)",
    x = "Anno",
    y = "MPI",
    color = "Paese"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()


#Grafico 3 paesi a confronto (2013-2021)
df_interp_GH_F <- df_interp_GH[c(6:14),]
df_interp_SEN_F <- df_interp_SEN[c(4:12),]
df_interp_NGA_F <- df_interp_NGA[,]


df_interp_GH_F$country <- "Ghana"
df_interp_NGA_F$country <- "Nigeria"
df_interp_SEN_F$country <- "Senegal"
df_final_F <- rbind(df_interp_GH_F, df_interp_NGA_F, df_interp_SEN_F)
library(ggplot2)
ggplot(df_final_F, aes(x = year, y = mpi, color = country)) +
  geom_line(size = 1.2) +
  labs(
    title = "Confronto MPI (interpolato annualmente) 2013-2021",
    x = "Anno",
    y = "MPI",
    color = "Paese"
  ) +
    theme_minimal()
```

# ELETTRICITÀ


```{r}
#ELETTRICITÀ
df_ele <- read.csv("elet.csv")
df_ele <- df_ele[c(1:3),c(-2,-3,-4)]

library(tidyr)

df_ele_long <- pivot_longer(
  df_ele,
  cols = -Country.Name,   # tutte le colonne tranne il paese
  names_to = "year",
  values_to = "value"
)

df_ele_long$year <- as.numeric(sub("X(\\d{4}).*", "\\1", df_ele_long$year))
df_ele_GH <- df_ele_long[c(1:9),]
df_ele_NGA <- df_ele_long[c(10:18),]
df_ele_SEN <- df_ele_long[c(19:27),]


#Grafico 3 paesi - elettricità

df_ele_final <- rbind(df_ele_GH, df_ele_NGA, df_ele_SEN)

library(ggplot2)
ggplot(df_ele_long, aes(x = year, y = value, color = Country.Name)) +
  geom_line(size = 1.2) +
  labs(
    title = "Access to electricity (% of population) 2013-2021",
    x = "Anno",
    y = "% of population",
    color = "Paese"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()
```

# EDUCATION
```{r}
#Average years of schooling among adult above 25
df_edu <- read.csv ("edu.csv")
ggplot(df_edu, aes(x = Year, y = Both.genders, color = Entity)) +
  geom_line(size = 1.2) +
  labs(
    title = "Average years of schooling among adult above 25 2013-2021",
    x = "Anno",
    y = "Average years",
    color = "Paese"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()
```
